steps.expected: Text output shows mission metadata, milestone ordering, and progress indicators
steps.observed: Output showed 'Progress Reporting Test Mission (2026-03-30-001)' with 2 milestones, each showing Features X/Y (Z%) and Assertions X/Y (Z%)

steps.expected: Parseable JSON with mission metadata and milestones array containing progress fields
steps.observed: Valid JSON returned with mission object (id, status, title, description, milestones, features) and milestones array with progress details (featureCount, completedFeatures, featureCompletionPct, assertionCount, passedAssertions, waivedAssertions, terminalAssertions, assertionCompletionPct)

steps.expected: Text output shows mission progress details
steps.observed: Output showed milestone m1 with Features: 0/2 completed (0%) and Assertions: 0/2 terminal (0%)

steps.expected: Parseable JSON with full mission metadata and progress object
steps.observed: Valid JSON returned with mission object, milestone object, and progress object containing all progress indicators

stdout: mission-list-text: Shows mission name, status, milestone count, and per-milestone progress percentages
mission-list-json: Contains mission.id, mission.status, mission.milestones[], milestones[].featureCompletionPct, milestones[].assertionCompletionPct
mission-show-text: Shows milestone details with feature/assertion counts and percentages
mission-show-json: Contains mission, milestone, and progress objects with complete metadata

steps.expected: Text output shows milestones with feature counts, assertion counts, and completion percentages
steps.observed: Output showed 2 milestones (m1, m2) with feature counts (2, 1), assertion counts (2, 1), and completion percentages (0% for all)

steps.expected: Parseable JSON with milestones array containing progress details
steps.observed: Valid JSON with mission object and milestones array; each milestone has milestoneId, status, featureCount, completedFeatures, featureCompletionPct, assertionCount, passedAssertions, waivedAssertions, terminalAssertions, assertionCompletionPct, waivedAssertionIds

steps.expected: Text output shows milestone progress with feature and assertion details
steps.observed: Output showed Milestone: m1, Title: Foundation, Status: pending, Features: 0/2 completed (0%), Assertions: 0/2 terminal (0%) with breakdown of passed/waived

steps.expected: Parseable JSON with milestone progress object containing all count fields
steps.observed: Valid JSON with mission, milestone, and progress objects; progress contains milestoneId, status, featureCount, completedFeatures, featureCompletionPct, assertionCount, passedAssertions, waivedAssertions, terminalAssertions, assertionCompletionPct, waivedAssertionIds

steps.expected: Parseable JSON for second milestone with correct feature/assertion counts
steps.observed: Valid JSON with correct counts: featureCount: 1, assertionCount: 1 (matches plan with 1 feature in m2)

stdout: milestone-list-text: Shows m1 (2 features, 2 assertions, 0%), m2 (1 feature, 1 assertion, 0%)
milestone-list-json: Contains milestones[] with featureCount, completedFeatures, featureCompletionPct, assertionCount, etc.
milestone-status-text: Shows detailed progress for specific milestone with counts and percentages
milestone-status-json: Contains progress object with complete count fields for features and assertions

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. VAL-MISSION-002 confirmed mission list/show commands expose persisted metadata, milestone ordering, and progress indicators in both text and JSON modes. VAL-MILESTONE-001 confirmed milestone list/status commands report feature counts, assertion counts, and completion percentages correctly.
